headlines.headline: The path of a Knicks-Spurs NBA Finals basketball starts with all 30 teams
headlines.description: When it came to prepping the basketballs being used in Spurs-Knicks -- it took a village. Namely, sweat, oil and dirt from all 30 teams.

headlines.headline: Mayfield: Contract talks 'not anywhere close' with Buccaneers
headlines.description: Speaking publicly for the first time this offseason, Buccaneers QB Baker Mayfield said that contract extension talks are "are not anywhere close to what we were thinking" and that it's "time to get something done long-term."

headlines.headline: Bears edge closer to move for new stadium in Northwest Indiana
headlines.description: The Bears took a significant step toward leaving Chicago on Friday after the team's board of directors voted Thursday to advance their stadium development plans in nearby Hammond, Indiana.

headlines.headline: Fantasy football buzz: With extension done, is Christian Watson ready to break out?
headlines.description: Liz Loza details Christian Watson impressive upside, while acknowledging his injury history.

headlines.headline: Caleb Williams' 'Madden NFL 27' cover inspired by Michael Jordan
headlines.description: The Bears quarterback said the pose, skyline and overall concept were designed as a tribute to Chicago's most famous athlete.

headlines.headline: Canadiens' honors: Suzuki wins Selke, Lady Byng to Caufield
headlines.description: Canadiens captain Nick Suzuki was the runaway winner for the Frank J. Selke Trophy for the NHL's best two-way forward, while his teammate Cole Caufield won the Lady Byng Memorial Trophy for sportsmanship and gentlemanly conduct.

headlines.headline: Stanley Cup odds: Hurricanes regain favorite status after wild Game 2 win
headlines.description: Tied 1-1 in the Stanley Cup Final, the Hurricanes are slight favorites over the Golden Knights to win the Cup.
